title: Dense Thai Chicken Pad Thai
description: A comforting, low‑fat Thai chicken pad thai with dashi extract, packed with protein and satisfying flavors.
instructions: Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium heat and add the teaspoon of vegetable oil.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, sautéing for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Toss in the sliced carrot and cook for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Stir in the diced chicken breast and cook until the pieces are lightly browned, about 3–4 minutes.
Pour in the soy sauce, fish sauce, lime juice, honey, tamarind paste, and dashi extract, stirring to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture simmer for 2 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Meanwhile, soak the rice noodles in warm water for 5 minutes, then drain.
Add the noodles and bean sprouts to the skillet, tossing everything together until the noodles are coated and heated through, about 3 minutes.
Taste the pad thai and adjust seasonings if needed, adding a splash more lime or soy sauce as desired.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with a sprinkle of toasted sesame seeds or extra lime wedges.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
